about.title: About Me
about.bio: I am a Junior Software Engineer specialized in backend development with Python and SQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL). I have experience with Java, JS, HTML, and CSS, as well as working in Linux environments using Git for project management. I am particularly interested in artificial intelligence and automation, and I seek to continue growing as a developer to integrate AI into solid and efficient backend solutions.
about.educationDescription: Training in software development, networks, databases, artificial intelligence, and cybersecurity.

bullets: Designed internal workflows by customizing Odoo views (XML, Python, JavaScript, SQL) to optimize operations and improve data consistency.
Built and launched a price verification kiosk and a responsive product catalog with real-time inventory, accelerating searches and improving the user/staff experience.

Maintained operations through technical support (PCs, printers, cabling), generated Power BI/Excel reports for decision-making, and administered WordPress/cPanel to ensure a stable and scalable web platform.

saas.title: SaaS Solutions
saas.description: At NeuroFlow AI, we help SMBs embrace digital transformation with practical AI solutions—from automation and smart marketing to personalized AI assistance. Your digital transformation starts here.
saas.cta: Interested in our solutions for your business?

projects.name: PayControl
projects.description: Payment and inventory tracking platform for freelancers and small businesses. Features payment tracking with custom statuses, recurring payments automation, contact management, asset monitoring, interactive dashboards, team workspaces, and AI-powered invoice extraction.

projects.name: Solvencia
projects.description: AI-powered personal finance management app with zero-friction expense tracking. Features smart receipt scanning that auto-extracts transaction details, intelligent budget suggestions, financial survival calendar, burn rate analysis, and multi-platform access via web, Telegram, and WhatsApp.

items.name: Record Management System
items.description: Built a full-stack academic management platform (Python/Flask, MySQL) with 2FA, CSRF protection, rate limiting, and bcrypt security. Implemented Application Factory pattern, RESTful APIs, connection pooling, intelligent caching, and a responsive ES6 modular dashboard—architected for scalability, performance, and maintainability.

items.name: ChatBot - Synapse AI
items.description: Interactive web chatbot powered by OpenAI APIs, featuring REST endpoints, persistent history, chat CRUD, dynamic model selection, input validation, and centralized error handling using Application Factory.

items.name: Data Analysis Platform
items.description: Full-stack data analysis platform with automated statistical processing of CSV datasets. Integrates machine learning for data type classification and context-aware analysis recommendations. Built with Django REST Framework backend and React frontend, featuring real-time interactive visualizations. Implements JWT authentication and ML model versioning for seamless updates without service interruption.

contact.title: Let's Work Together?
contact.description: I am available for software development opportunities and collaboration on interesting projects.
